title: Agent Triage Configuration
description: Dashboard for monitoring parallel Claude Code agents in cmux.

$schema.description: Path to the JSON schema file for editor validation.

port.description: HTTP server port for the dashboard.

cmux.description: Connection settings for the cmux terminal multiplexer.

binary.description: Path to the cmux binary. When null, tries `which cmux`, then checks /Applications/cmux.app/Contents/Resources/bin/cmux.

socket.description: Path to the cmux Unix socket. When null, uses ~/Library/Application Support/cmux/cmux.sock.

loops.description: Claude Loops integration — monitors autonomous loop agents running in the background.

enabled.description: Show the Loops tab. When shown but the plugin isn't installed, displays an install prompt.

dataDir.description: Path to the claude-loops plugin data directory. When null, searches ~/.claude/plugins/data/ for a directory matching claude-loops-*.

installUrl.description: URL shown when the claude-loops plugin is not installed.

tickets.description: Jira integration — shows your assigned tickets grouped by parent story. Auto-detects a running Jira MCP server at startup.

enabled.description: Show the Tickets tab. When shown but Jira isn't available, displays a setup hint.

pulls.description: GitHub PR monitoring — shows your open PRs and incoming review requests.

enabled.description: Show the Pull Requests tab. When shown but the gh CLI isn't installed, displays a setup hint.

orgFilter.description: Limit PR search to specific GitHub organizations. Example: ["MyCompany"]. When null, searches all orgs.
